title: ToolTreaux Safety Silver Testing Kit with Testing Stone, 7pc
description:
Safely test for platinum purity with ToolTreaux’s Platinum Purity Testing Safety Kit! The kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the platinum purity testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin collectors, antiques and jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with precious metals

ToolTreaux Safety Silver Testing Kit with Testing Stone, 7pc

Safely test for silver purity with ToolTreaux’s Silver Purity Testing Safety Kit! The kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the silver purity testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin, antiques and jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with precious metals.

Key Features

  • SILVER TESTING KIT: Safely test silver purity and quality; kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the silver testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests
  • SILVER TESTING KIT METHOD: This silver testing method is ideally used on silver material that has yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished silver items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish of the item
  • HOW THE SILVER TESTING KIT WORKS: To test for silver purity, scratch the item on to the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if material is of high quality silver, the solution will turn bright red; if the solution turns blue or green the sample may contain brass or copper; if the sample deposit dissolves quickly, or the solution turns a dark brown or yellow, it is likely a base metal
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Testing Stone Dimensions: 2 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches; Stone Weight: 0.01lbs; Bottle Dimensions: 3 x 1 x 1 inches; Bottle Weight: 0.04lbs; Bottle Material: Plastic; Solution Capacity: 0.5 ounces; Solution made in USA
  • NOTE: Keep out of reach of children; Use caution when opening and using; Proper protective gloves and eyewear are highly recommended; Instruction pamphlet included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: N92LDH620
  • UPC: 810058481139
  • Color: Red
  • Size: Medium

SILVER TESTING KIT METHOD: This silver testing method is ideally used on material that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished silver or potentially sterling silver items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish of the item

TESTING FOR SILVER: To test for silver purity and quality, scratch the item onto the thoroughly washed test stone, leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the material is of high quality silver, the solution will turn bright red; if the solution turns blue or green the sample may contain brass or copper; if the sample deposit dissolves quickly, or the solution turns a dark brown or yellow, it is likely a base metal (or could potentially be a silver plated item in which case results can vary depending on deposit)

SAFETY NOTE: Testing Solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow the included operational instructions.
